textPlain: Is there any reason you aren't hosting web-optimized images on the demo? When I click through to it, the images load slowly enough I'm just left with a bunch of gray boxes for 30 or so seconds.

I noticed this too. I was actually working on this yesterday, https://github.com/graycoreio/daffodil/pull/3946I got a little side-tracked over the weekend and didn't get a new build of the demo in with the new image loader. I'll have this fixed shortly!
